requirementCueLines: * Additional credit may not be earned for a course that overlaps in content with a previously completed course. See course catalog descriptions for specific credit allowances for overlapping courses.
*Additional credit may not be earned for a course that overlaps in content with a previously completed course. See course catalog descriptions for specific credit allowances for overlapping courses.
*For students admitted to the university prior to Autumn 2023, the DIV requirement is 3 credits.
*If not applied towards core course requirements.
*Note: Prospective students may not see these new major requirements reflected in DARS until they have declared the major and registered for Autumn 2024 or until Autumn 2024 has begun.
10 additional credits of A&H or SSc
10 credits A&H
10 credits SSc
15 credits sciences
20 additional credits from mathematics, statistics, or sciences
5 additional credits of mathematics or statistics
5 credits English composition (C)
5 credits mathematics
5 credits Reasoning (RSN) Met by HCDE mathematics requirement.
5 credits statistics
5 credits* Diversity (DIV) Met by HCDE 315 or another DIV course.
7 credits Writing (W) 5 credits met by HCDE 313. HCDE 417 and HCDE 419 may also apply towards the W requirement if taken Autumn 2025 or later.
A A 210
A A 260

A minimum of 3 credits of Diversity (DIV) is required for students admitted prior to Autumn 2023 . For students admitted in Autumn 2023 or later , this requirement has been increased to 5 credits . The DIV credits may overlap with other degree requirements.
A minimum of 5 credits of Reasoning (RSN, formerly QSR) is required. The RSN credits may overlap with the math/statistics courses above.
A&H and SSc (30 credits)
Additional courses from HCDE engineering fundamentals list to reach 12 credits minimum

Additional credit may not be earned for a course that overlaps in content with a previously completed course. See UW Course Catalog descriptions for specific credit allowances for overlapping courses.

Additional credit may not be earned for a course that overlaps in content with a previously completed course. See UW Course Catalog descriptions for specific credit allowances for overlapping courses. Credit is also not awarded for mathematics courses taken out of sequence.
All courses taken for the HCDE Natural Sciences requirements must come from the HCDE-specific mathematics, statistics, and sciences course lists .
Areas of Inquiry
Arts and Humanities (A&H) and Social Sciences (SSc) (30 credits)
ASTR 211
ASTR 301
ASTR 321
ASTR 322
ASTR 323
ASTR 423
ASTR 480
CEE 220
Core & Elective Courses
Core & Elective Courses (82 credits)
Courses that count toward these requirements are identified as A&H, SSc, and DIV in the quarterly Time Schedule and in the UW Catalogue.

parsedRequirementGroups.label: Engineering Elective Credit (15 credits)
parsedRequirementGroups.sourceHeading: Students must take 23 credits of HCDE electives, with at least 15 credits from the Engineering Electives list and at least 8 credits from the Systems and Society Electives list. Additional courses from the Engineering Electives list may also apply towards the Systems and Society Electives requirement if the Engineering Electives requirement has been satisfied.

Additional courses from the Engineering Electives list may also apply towards the Systems and Society Electives requirement if the Engineering Electives requirement has been satisfied.
notes: Program-specific approved bucket; do not satisfy with generic Area of Inquiry category matching unless an approved filter also backs the course.

parsedRequirementGroups.label: 3 credits of Diversity
parsedRequirementGroups.sourceHeading: A minimum of 3 credits of Diversity (DIV) is required for students admitted prior to Autumn 2023 . For students admitted in Autumn 2023 or later , this requirement has been increased to 5 credits . The DIV credits may overlap with other degree requirements.
